name: Pumpkin Cake Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the 3 eggs at high speed for 5 minutes.
2. Gradually add 1 cup sugar, stirring continuously.
3. Stir in 2/3 cup pumpkin and 1 teaspoon lemon juice.
4. Mix together the remaining ingredients: flour, nutmeg, ginger, cinnamon, baking powder, salt, powdered sugar, cream cheese, butter, and vanilla extract.
5. Fold the mixture into the pumpkin mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured cake pan.
7. Sprinkle chopped walnuts on top of the batter.
8. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and sprinkle the cooked cake with powdered sugar.
10. Carefully turn out the cake onto a clean towel sprinkled with powdered sugar.
11. Roll up the cake in the towel.
12. Chill before serving.
Unroll the cake, gently spread it with cream cheese mixture, roll it again, and chill before serving.
